_comment: Store screenshot slots + captions (canonical-store-listings.md § Screenshot principles). Slot 1 = core value prop + free, slot 2 = Josh Approved card (no source), slots 3..N = features in descending priority. Captions double as ASO keyword text (Apple extracts them) — keep them plain and in voice. The framed PNGs are produced by the capture pipeline on a Mac/sim (qa/journey.json screenshots 'home' + 'add' → framed); until that run they're pending and the listing preview reports them as such.

ios.caption: Free expense tracker. See your month by category, at a glance.
Add an expense in seconds — amount, category, done.
